subject: fix: address codebase review findings across hooks and components
body:
- useStations.ts: Replace `as unknown[]` cast with typed `Array.isArray()`
  check + runtime validation. Supabase .rpc() doesn't support .returns<T[]>()
  cleanly without generated types, so use explicit type guard instead.
- FuelMapWeb.tsx: Add `| undefined` to getSource() cast and null guard to
  prevent crash when source hasn't loaded yet.
- useAppTheme.ts: Remove `factory` from useThemedStyles useMemo deps — callers
  pass inline functions which defeat memoization on every render.
- usePWAUpdate.ts: Guard updateApp() with ref to prevent duplicate
  controllerchange listeners on rapid clicks.

Tags: typescript, hooks, safety, performance
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-review
Semver: patch
